comment: this card was added to my hand during the first turn, does that not count?

player_cards.name: Mudcrab Merchant
player_cards.rules_text: Summon: The Merchant shows you two cards he has for sale. Choose one to put into your hand. He puts the other into your opponent's hand.

hand.name: Stronghold Patrol
hand.rules_text: Summon: Draw a card if you have two other Strength creatures.

hand.name: Murkwater Butcher
hand.rules_text: If Murkwater Butcher is in your hand during your first turn, reduce his cost to 1.

hand.name: Abecean Navigator
hand.rules_text: Summon: If the top card of your deck is an action, draw it. Otherwise, put it on the bottom.

hand.name: Thieves Guild Recruit
hand.rules_text: Summon: Draw a card. If it costs 7 or more, reduce its cost by 1.

Guard
